cookie-information:
Cookies are used!
This App uses cookie technology! Your personalized settings are saved on your device to offer you a better experience.
title: Title
lose-changes: You will lose all the Changes you made !!!
help_desktop:
Help

Mouse Whell Zoom-in, Zoom-out (if auto enabled)

Left mouse button down + Mouse move Rotate Model

Right mouse button down + Mouse move Change position of Model
help_mobile:
Help

Two Fingers (open, close) Zoom-in, Zoom-out (if auto enabled)

Tap + left, right, down and up Rotate Model

Two Fingers + left, right, down and up Change position of Model
secure-text:
Worried about privacy?
Images, Fonts and all other Assets never leave your device. Customizer3D does all the work locally.
preferred-image-size:
Preferred Size and Notice:
[printSize] ([pixelWidth]px X [pixelHeight]px) @ [DPI] DPI,
otherwise your image during printing becomes blurry.
smaller-than-preffered: [warningIcon]Image width and/or height smaller than preferred!
readme_txt: WINDOWS -----------------------------------------If fonts is not installed on your system, select the "*.ttf, *.otf" files in the "fonts" folder and right-click (Install).
convert-to-cmyk-notice:
File contains RGB image(s) you can easily convert to CMYK with Graphic softwares, like Adobe Illustrator ([ILLUSTRATOR_SCREENSHOT]) or CorelDraw ([COREL_SCREENSHOT])

[DOWNLOAD]

Or you can convert PDF to CMYK online ([PDFTOCMYK_COM]) CMYK is the color format used in the printing process.NOTICE! Please control the colors of PDF after converting to CMYK!
webxr-notice: Please move your device slowly to where you want to place the Model... And wait for the white circle...
render-quality-each-slot: Specify the render quality for each slot.
